name: How long does workers comp process take in North Salt Lake Utah?

mainEntity.name: How long does workers comp process take in North Salt Lake Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: Initial benefits 20-45 days post-report; full resolution 6-18 months including MMI, ratings, settlements. Appeals add 6-12 months.[1] Key factors: insurer delays, disputes, hearing schedules. Submit complete app, follow up weekly; lawyer speeds it. Patience key, but monitor.
